api_key.description: CoinMarketCap Pro API key, sent on the X-CMC_PRO_API_KEY header. Never logged.

base_url.description: CoinMarketCap Pro API base URL override for tests or proxies.

cryptocurrency_ids.description: Comma-separated CoinMarketCap cryptocurrency IDs (e.g. "1,1027"), used as the `id` query param for the id/slug/symbol-keyed detail streams (cryptocurrency_info, cryptocurrency_quotes_latest). Required for those two streams only; leave unset if only reading other streams.

convert.description: Comma-separated fiat/crypto symbols CoinMarketCap converts quote values into (the `convert` query param on quote-bearing endpoints). Defaults to USD, matching CoinMarketCap's own documented default.

price_conversion_amount.description: Amount to convert for the price_conversion stream's `amount` query param (required only when reading that stream).

price_conversion_id.description: CoinMarketCap cryptocurrency ID to convert FROM, for the price_conversion stream's `id` query param (use this OR price_conversion_symbol, not both).

price_conversion_symbol.description: Cryptocurrency symbol to convert FROM, for the price_conversion stream's `symbol` query param (use this OR price_conversion_id, not both).

altcoin_season_timeframe.description: Timeframe for the altcoin_season_index_historical stream: one of 7d, 30d, 90d.

historical_time_start.description: Optional Unix-or-ISO-8601 start timestamp for the global_metrics_quotes_historical stream's `time_start` query param.

historical_time_end.description: Optional Unix-or-ISO-8601 end timestamp for the global_metrics_quotes_historical stream's `time_end` query param.

historical_count.description: Optional result count (1-10000, CoinMarketCap default 10) for the global_metrics_quotes_historical stream's `count` query param.

historical_interval.description: Optional interval (e.g. "1d") for the global_metrics_quotes_historical stream's `interval` query param.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
